= examples
:description: Project directory

This directory is part of the paint.type project.

== Purpose

Project directory.


As a Level 3 directory (`third_party/gossamer/examples/`), it supports the overall
project structure.

== Contents by Functional Grouping\n\n== Subdirectories\n\n[cols="1,2", options="header"]\n|===\n| Directory | Purpose\n| `window-controls/` | |\n| `capabilities/` | |\n| `ipc/` | |\n| `hello/` | |\n| `game-server-admin/` | |\n|===\n\n=== Configuration\n\n* `web-project-deno.json` — JSON configuration\n\n=== Other Files\n\n* `0.1-AI-MANIFEST.a2ml` — A2ML machine-readable metadata\n\n
== Purpose of Each Component

Each file in this directory serves a specific purpose.

*Configuration files* define build, test, and deployment parameters.\n
*Other files* support directory operations.\n

== AI Manifest Structure

* `0.3-AI-MANIFEST.a2ml` (this file) - Level 3 manifest for `third_party/gossamer/examples/`

* Each subdirectory has its own `0.4-AI-MANIFEST.a2ml`
